title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Law, Unknown person #2, Tama, Unknown person #3, Kaido as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've lost sight of him now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE HAS FLED WITH YOUNG MASTER YAMATO AND THE KUNOICHI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: leader of Wano's Samuel Army Mononosuke

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Isn't there a less conspicuous way!?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Hey!! Which way's the forbidden storeroom!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's near the entrance... of the skull dome...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kin'emon and the others are in the opposite direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Warrors of the full moon indeed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You lost to me simply because the weather wasn't in your favor.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 40 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
